content: You appear to be stuck on [Check all jump connections available from Kornephoros. The known 7-system network is: Albireo, The Rampart, Dawnbreak, Saclateni, Fumalsamakah, Kornephoros, GSC-0013. If any connected system is NOT in this list, jump to it and perform a full survey: catalog all locations (stars, planets, belts, ice fields, stations), all resources and quantities, and all jump connections with distances. Then return to Kornephoros before completing. If ALL connections lead to already-known systems, report that Kornephoros is a frontier dead end. Do not re-explore known systems.] in phase active for 15 minutes. Assess your current situation and either continue or abandon and replan.
